description: Involved in designing, building, and maintaining end-to-end systems across backend and frontend for a Training Managment System.

Worked on scalable APIs, database design, third-party integrations, CI/CD pipelines, performance testing, security, and environment management, supporting projects from development through production and live deployment.
Concurrently supported other major projects that levrages on CMS such as Sitefinity, Kentico and Strapi
Developed and designed a Web Application for FigureLab.com (The Figure Lab PLT) Independently managed the project lifecycle, including initial planning, wireframing, coding and deployment.
